group.label: Block Payment Bot
group.comment: Prevent bot attacks on payment processing

field.label: IP Whitelist
field.comment: IPs in this list are never blocked. One IP per row.

field.label: Behind Trusted Proxy / CDN
field.comment: Enable if the server is behind a trusted proxy, CDN, or load balancer (Fastly, Cloudflare, Varnish, Nginx). When enabled, client IP is read from proxy headers (X-Forwarded-For, Fastly-Client-IP, CF-Connecting-IP). When disabled, only REMOTE_ADDR is used — proxy headers are ignored to prevent IP spoofing.

field.label: Require Form Check Parameter
field.comment: Validates that payment requests include the form_check parameter. This prevents bots that bypass the checkout form. Recommended: only if frontend is installed

field.label: Bot Block Time (minutes)
field.comment: Time period (in minutes) to block an IP after detecting bot behavior. Default: 2 minutes. Environment variable MAGE_BOT_BLOCK_TIME takes precedence.

field.label: Bot Record Time (minutes)
field.comment: Time period (in minutes) to track payment attempts per IP/cart. Default: 2 minutes. Environment variable MAGE_BOT_RECORD_TIME takes precedence.

field.label: Bot Block Count
field.comment: Maximum number of payment attempts allowed per IP/cart within the record time period. Default: 20. Environment variable MAGE_BOT_BLOCK_COUNT takes precedence.

field.label: Bot Rules
field.comment: Per-path overrides. Path uses regex with delimiters. Examples: /\/V1\/guest-carts\/.*\/payment-information/i (payment), /\/V1\/customers/i (register), /\/contact/i (contact). Rules override default block count/time when path matches.
